name: Dalrymple Bay Infrastructure Limited
analysis: DBI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.7378. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.7914 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.7378, stop A$5.3559, target A$5.9400. Risk/reward is 0.53:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
